title: Lightweight
description: A revamp to chainmail, gold, and leather armor!
body:
#  ![chestplate icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0014015a85949b4c7ada62af2da9b947a968bbf0.png) - An Overhaul to Weaker Armor - ![chestplate icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0014015a85949b4c7ada62af2da9b947a968bbf0.png)

  Now chainmail, gold, and leather armor all have the same armor points and durability. The main difference between the armors is the bonus stats. 

 ## ![Chainmail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbc615a51786b37e80e463d07539113d0e00b682.png) Chainmail armor increases your movement speed. ![Chainmail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbc615a51786b37e80e463d07539113d0e00b682.png)

## ![chestplate icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0014015a85949b4c7ada62af2da9b947a968bbf0.png)  Gold armor increases your attack and mining speed. ![chestplate icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0014015a85949b4c7ada62af2da9b947a968bbf0.png)
  
## ![Leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2833894663f2a4a37a52e9516169306b277220a2.png)  Leather increases the blocks you fall before you take fall damage. ![Leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2833894663f2a4a37a52e9516169306b277220a2.png)

##  On top of all of that, chainmail also has a recipe.

  (This will be changed in a future version, but currently the only way to get the buffs on armor is by crafting it. Armor found in chests and from villagers will be unchanged.)
